message:
fix(db): use close_sync for explicit connection cleanup and thread context through MVCC backoff

- Replace no-op `drop(conn)` in `close_db_conn` with
  `conn.close_sync()`, logging a warning on failure so leaked
  connections surface in traces instead of silently disappearing.
- Add `_cx: &Cx` parameter to `mvcc_backoff` for future
  cancellation-awareness (signature-only change, no behavioral diff).
- Use bare `drop(conn)` for the server readiness check connection,
  which is short-lived and doesn't need the logged close path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
